mnemonics: Traveling Salesman Problem is a bit like a salesman trying to sell all the cities in the world, and the goal is to visit all the cities and return home in the shortest distance possible
keyPoints: Exhaustive Search Algorithm: Checking all possible routes to find the shortest path
Brute Force Approach: Works by generating all permutations of the cities and calculating the total distance for each permutation
Section 3.4: Travelling Salesman Problem is NP-hard, meaning that the running time of algorithms increases exponentially as the size of the input increases
